Recommendations: The homepage currently uses a generic WebPage schema with no Organization entity. Two changes are required: (1) Add an Organization entity with the brand name, logo URL, and sameAs links to all active social media profiles. This is how Google identifies and verifies the brand for Knowledge Panel and AI Overview purposes. (2) Assign a persistent @id to both the WebPage and Organization entities using the URL with a #fragment — this allows other pages to reference the same entities consistently across the site.

Recommended Schema Markup: {"@context":"https://schema.org","@graph":[{"@type":"CollectionPage","@id":"https://www.domain.com/products/","url":"https://www.domain.com/products/","name":"All Coffee Creamers","description":"Browse the full range of coffee creamers.","mainEntity":{"@type":"ItemList","itemListElement":[{"@type":"ListItem","position":1,"url":"https://www.domain.com/products/vanilla-creamer/"}]}}]}
Recommendations: The category page currently uses a generic WebPage schema. It should use CollectionPage to accurately describe a page that lists a collection of products. The mainEntity property should include an ItemList referencing the product URLs on the page. This allows search engines and AI systems to understand the relationship between the category page and its child product pages, improving the likelihood of rich results and accurate AI citation.

Recommended Schema Markup: {"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"Product","@id":"https://www.domain.com/products/vanilla-creamer/","name":"Vanilla Coffee Creamer","description":"Rich and creamy vanilla-flavoured coffee creamer.","image":"https://www.domain.com/images/vanilla-creamer.jpg","brand":{"@type":"Brand","name":"Brand Name"},"offers":{"@type":"Offer","priceCurrency":"CAD","availability":"https://schema.org/InStock"},"aggregateRating":{"@type":"AggregateRating","ratingValue":"4.6","reviewCount":"124"}}
Recommendations: No schema markup is present on product pages. Adding Product schema enables star ratings to appear in search results (rich results), which significantly increases click-through rate. The minimum required properties are: name, image, and offers. The aggregateRating property should be added if customer reviews are available — this is required for star ratings to appear in search results. The brand property connects the product to the Organisation entity on the homepage.
